BaseField.Name: DataField328
BaseField.Text: Date of CalGETS Individual Outpatient Intake

BaseField.Name: DataField343
BaseField.Text: Date of CalGETS End of Treatment Form

BaseField.Name: DataField40
BaseField.Text: Do you speak a language other than English at home?

BaseField.Name: DataField176
BaseField.Text: How well do you speak English?

BaseField.Name: DataField571
BaseField.Text: 1. Has treatment helped you to deal more effectively with your gambling problem?

ItemList.string: No, it seemed to make things worse
Yes, it helped a great deal

BaseField.Name: DataField10
BaseField.Text: 1. Has treatment helped you to deal more effectively with your problem gambler?

ItemList.string: No, it seemed to make things worse
Yes, it helped a great deal

BaseField.Name: DataField12
BaseField.Text: 2. Overall, how satisfied are you with the treatment that you received?

BaseField.Name: DataField15
BaseField.Text: 3. Did you get the kind of treatment you expected when you enrolled?

BaseField.Name: DataField16
BaseField.Text: 4. If a friend or family were in need of similar help, would you recommend this provider?

BaseField.Name: DataField18
BaseField.Text: 5. In general, how comfortable were you talking with this provider?

BaseField.Name: DataField21
BaseField.Text: 6. If you were to seek help again, would you come back to this provider?

BaseField.Name: DataField22
BaseField.Text: 7. Do you feel the provider was sensitive to your cultural background?

BaseField.Name: DataField24
BaseField.Text: 8.How often did the provider explain things clearly, listen to you carefully, and treat you with courtesy and respect?

BaseField.Name: DataField33
BaseField.Text: 9.How often did you find the provider’s office to be clean, professional and comfortable?

BaseField.Name: DataField37
BaseField.Text: Are you currently receiving professional treatment for problem gambling?

BaseField.Name: DataField43
BaseField.Text: Are you currently receiving professional treatment to cope with the problem gambler?

BaseField.Name: DataField44
BaseField.Text: Which of the following best describes the treatment you are receiving?

ItemList.string: Outpatient therapist, paid by the state
Outpatient therapist, paid for by me or my insurance
Residential treatment, paid for by me or my insurance
Intensive Outpatient Treatment, paid by me or my insurance

BaseField.Name: Sect2 Type of Treatment Other AI
DataField45
BaseField.Text: Which of the following best describes the treatment you are receiving?

ItemList.string: Outpatient therapist, paid by the state
Outpatient therapist, paid for by me or my insurance
Residential treatment, paid by the state
Residential treatment, paid for by me or my insurance
Intensive Outpatient Treatment, paid by the state
Intensive Outpatient Treatment, paid by me or my insurance

BaseField.Name: DataField47
BaseField.Text: What is the main reason why you are not receiving treatment for problem gambling?

BaseField.Name: DataField348
BaseField.Text: What is the main reason why you are not receiving treatment to cope with the problem gambler?

ItemList.string: Don’t feel like I need treatment anymore
I cannot access treatment because of time
I cannot access treatment because of transportation issues
I don’t believe treatment works for me
I don’t want to stop gambling

BaseField.Name: DataField48
BaseField.Text: As of today, how would you characterize your gambling problem?

ItemList.string: Under control but it could return in the future
About the same as when I started treatment
Worse than before I started treatment

BaseField.Name: DataField49
BaseField.Text: As of today, how would you characterize your ability to cope with the problem gambler?

ItemList.string: Under control but problems could return in the future
About the same as when I started treatment
Worse than before I started treatment

BaseField.Name: DataField53
BaseField.Text: To the best of your knowledge, in the past 30 days, how many days has the problem gambler gambled?

BaseField.Name: DataField54
BaseField.Text: To the best of your knowledge, since the last visit, how many days has the problem gambler gambled?

BaseField.Name: DataField55
BaseField.Text: Is the problem gambler that affects you currently receiving or participating in: (mark all that apply)

BaseField.Name: DataField85
BaseField.Text: Public problem gambling treatment (Paid for by State)

BaseField.Name: DataField228
BaseField.Text: Private problem gambling treatment (Paid by Self, Insurance)

BaseField.Name: DataField820
BaseField.Text: Since the last visit, which of the following have you done? (mark all that apply)

BaseField.Name: DataField56
BaseField.Text: In the last 12 months, which of the following have you done? (mark all that apply)

BaseField.Name: DataField57
BaseField.Text: In the past 30 days, which of the following have you done? (mark all that apply)

BaseField.Name: DataField247
BaseField.Text: Denied that the problem gambler has a problem.

BaseField.Name: DataField240
BaseField.Text: Lied for or made excuses for the problem gambler.

BaseField.Name: DataField258
BaseField.Text: Given the problem gambler an ultimatum.

BaseField.Name: DataField262
BaseField.Text: Bailed problem gambler out of jail.

BaseField.Name: DataField798
BaseField.Text: When did you become aware of the gambling problem?

BaseField.Name: DataField42
BaseField.Text: Since the last visit, how many days have you gambled?

BaseField.Name: DataField556
BaseField.Text: In the past 30 days, how many days have you gambled?

BaseField.Name: DataField46
BaseField.Text: Since the last visit, what type(s) of gambling activities have you done?

BaseField.Name: DataField558
BaseField.Text: In the past 30 days, what type(s) of gambling have you done?

BaseField.Name: DataField50
BaseField.Text: What type(s) of gambling have you done in the last 12 months? (Mark all that apply)

BaseField.Name: DataField143
BaseField.Text: Where do you typically gamble? (Mark all that apply)

BaseField.Name: DataField178
BaseField.Text: What percentage of total gambling time do you spend on the following activities? (must equal 100%)

BaseField.Name: Percentage Total
DataField242
BaseField.Text: How much are you or your household currently in debt?

BaseField.Name: DataField67
BaseField.Text: Have you filed or are you in the process of filing for bankruptcy?

BaseField.Name: DataField835
BaseField.Text: Since the last visit, on the days that you gambled, about how many hours did you spend gambling per day?

BaseField.Name: DataField75
BaseField.Text: In the past 30 days, on the days that you gambled, about how many hours did you spend gambling per day?

BaseField.Name: DataField115
BaseField.Text: In the past 30 days, on the days that you gambled, about how much money have you lost gambling?

BaseField.Name: DataField836
BaseField.Text: Since the last visit, on days that you gambled, about how much money did you lose gambling?

BaseField.Name: DataField119
BaseField.Text: How many days has it been since your last bet? (If you don't know, approximate)

BaseField.Name: DataField272
BaseField.Text: At what age did you gamble for the first time?

BaseField.Name: DataField276
BaseField.Text: At what age did you start having problems because of gambling?

BaseField.Name: DataField123
BaseField.Text: In the past 12 months, how many Gamblers Anonymous (GA) meetings have you attended?

BaseField.Name: DataField566
BaseField.Text: Since the last visit, how many Gamblers Anonymous (GA) meetings have you attended?

BaseField.Name: DataField329
BaseField.Text: In the past 30 days, how many Gamblers Anonymous (GA) meetings have you attended?

BaseField.Name: DataField79
BaseField.Text: In the past 12 months, how many Gam-Anon meetings have you attended?

BaseField.Name: DataField80
BaseField.Text: Since the last visit, how many Gam-Anon meetings have you attended?

BaseField.Name: DataField81
BaseField.Text: In the past 30 days, how many Gam-Anon meetings have you attended?

BaseField.Name: DataField339
BaseField.Text: Do you have a commitment to the meeting? (set up chairs, pass out books, make the coffee)

BaseField.Name: DataField88
BaseField.Text: If you have NOT attended Gam-Anon in the last 30 days, what is the main reason?

BaseField.Name: DataField89
BaseField.Text: If you have NOT attended Gam-Anon since the last visit, what is the main reason?

BaseField.Name: DataField90
BaseField.Text: If you have NOT attended Gam-Anon in the last 12 months, what is the main reason?

BaseField.Name: DataField91
BaseField.Text: If you have NOT attended GA in the last 30 days, what is the main reason?

BaseField.Name: DataField92
BaseField.Text: If you have NOT attended GA since the last visit, what is the main reason?

BaseField.Name: DataField94
BaseField.Text: If you have NOT attended GA in the last 12 months, what is the main reason?

ItemList.string: GA meetings are too spiritual/too religious
Not comfortable sharing about my problems
Did not know where meetings are
Did not have access to meetings (no transportation, childcare, etc.)
GA meetings are not led by a professional mental health provider

BaseField.Name: DataField98
BaseField.Text: What is your goal in treatment right now?

ItemList.string: Reduce amount of money lost gambling

BaseField.Name: DataField100
BaseField.Text: Think about the last 12 months of your gambling when answering these following questions:

BaseField.Name: DataField278
BaseField.Text: 1. Have there ever been periods lasting 2 weeks or longer when you spent a lot of time thinking about your gambling experiences, planning out future gambling ventures, bets, or thinking about ways of getting money to gamble with?

BaseField.Name: DataField282
BaseField.Text: 2. Have there ever been periods when you needed to gamble increasing amounts of money or place larger bets than before in order to get the same feeling of excitement?

BaseField.Name: DataField286
BaseField.Text: 3. Have you ever felt restless or irritable when trying to stop, cut down, or control your gambling?

BaseField.Name: DataField290
BaseField.Text: 4. Have you ever tried and not succeeded in stopping, cutting down, or controlling your gambling three or more times in your life?

BaseField.Name: DataField294
BaseField.Text: 5. Have you ever gambled to escape from personal problems or to relieve uncomfortable feelings such as guilt, anxiety, helplessness, or depression?

BaseField.Name: DataField298
BaseField.Text: 6. Has there ever been a period when, if you lost money gambling one day, you would often return another day to get even?

BaseField.Name: DataField302
BaseField.Text: 7. Have you lied to family members, friends, or others about how much you gamble, and/or about how much money you lost on gambling on at least three occasions?

BaseField.Name: DataField306
BaseField.Text: 8. Have you ever written a bad check or taken money that didn't belong to you from family members, friends, or anyone else in order to pay for your gambling?

BaseField.Name: DataField310
BaseField.Text: 9. Has your gambling ever caused serious or repeated problems in your relationships with any of your family members or friends, or has your gambling ever caused you problems at work or school?

BaseField.Name: DataField314
BaseField.Text: 10. Have you ever needed to ask family members, friends, a lending institution, or anyone else to loan you money or otherwise bail you out of a desperate money situation that was largely caused by your gambling?

BaseField.Name: DataField325
BaseField.Text: Prior to today, how many times have you sought professional treatment to help you manage the problem gambler in your life?

BaseField.Name: DataField107
BaseField.Text: Prior to today, how many therapists or counselors have you seen for treatment of your gambling problem?

BaseField.Name: DataField346
BaseField.Text: Do you have any current or pending civil or criminal legal problems?

BaseField.Name: Label867
BaseField.Text: What, if any, of the following illegal activities have you engaged in to get money for gambling, due to gambling problems, or to pay gambling debt?

BaseField.Name: DataField382
BaseField.Text: Are you currently on probation or parole in any jurisdiction?

BaseField.Name: Label790
BaseField.Text: Preferred Gambling Activity/Most Harmful Gambling Activity

BaseField.Name: Label791
BaseField.Text: What is your preferred form of gambling?

BaseField.Name: Label793
BaseField.Text: List other preferred form of gambling

BaseField.Name: Label795
BaseField.Text: What form of gambling results in the most harm for you? (Mark all that apply)

BaseField.Name: Label779
BaseField.Text: Over the last 30 days, on how many days did you have interpersonal conflict that involved yelling at or insulting: (Ranging from 0 to 30)

BaseField.Name: Label821
BaseField.Text: Over the last 30 days, on how many days did you have interpersonal conflict that involved throwing things or hitting: (Ranging from 0 to 30)

BaseField.Name: Row_CoOccuring2
BaseField.Text: How would you rate your overall health right now?

BaseField.Name: DataField393
BaseField.Text: Family Member(s) with a substance abuse problem? (Mark all that apply)

BaseField.Name: DataField406
BaseField.Text: Family Member(s) with Gambling Problem (Mark all that apply)

BaseField.Name: DataField421
BaseField.Text: In the past 12 months, has a doctor diagnosed or treated you for any of the following disorders? (Mark all that apply)

BaseField.Name: DataField436
BaseField.Text: Do you currently have health insurance?

BaseField.Name: DataField440
BaseField.Text: Do you have a primary health doctor?

BaseField.Name: DataField113
BaseField.Text: When was the last time you saw a medical doctor?

BaseField.Name: DataField116
BaseField.Text: Has your primary doctor ever asked about your gambling?

BaseField.Name: DataField184
BaseField.Text: About how old were you when you smoked your first whole cigarette?

BaseField.Name: DataField200
BaseField.Text: On how many of the past 30 days did you smoke cigarettes?

BaseField.Name: DataField448
BaseField.Text: On average, about how many cigarettes a day do you now smoke?

BaseField.Name: DataField454
BaseField.Text: How soon after you wake up in the morning do you usually smoke your first cigarette?

BaseField.Name: DataField202
BaseField.Text: During the past 30 days, how many days did you use…

BaseField.Name: DataField212
BaseField.Text: Do you now use e-cigarettes or other electronic “vaping” products?

BaseField.Name: DataField214
BaseField.Text: During the past 30 days, how many days did you use any type of e-cigarette, vape pen, or e-hookah, such as Blu, NJOY, or Vuse, or any larger devices for vaping, sometimes called vapes, tanks, or mods?

BaseField.Name: DataField118
BaseField.Text: During the past 30 days, how many days per week or per month did you have at least one drink of any alcoholic beverage, such as beer, wine, a malt beverage or liquor?

BaseField.Name: DataField227
BaseField.Text: One drink is equivalent to 12-ounce beer, a 5-ounce glass of wine, or a drink with one shot of liquor. During the past 30 days, on the days when you drank, about how many drinks did you drink on average?

BaseField.Name: DataField216
BaseField.Text: During the past 30 days, what is the largest number of drinks you had on any occasion?

BaseField.Name: DataField218
BaseField.Text: How many times during the past 30 days did you have 5 or more drinks for men or 4 or more drinks for women on an occasion?

BaseField.Name: DataField472
BaseField.Text: In the past 12 months, have you used any of the following substances? (Mark all that apply)

BaseField.Name: DataField120
BaseField.Text: Since Intake, have you used any of the following substances? (Mark all that apply)

BaseField.Name: DataField220
BaseField.Text: How many days in the past 30 have you used….

BaseField.Name: DataField233
BaseField.Text: At what age did you first use… (if never, enter -7)

BaseField.Name: DataField249
BaseField.Text: Has a friend or relative or anyone else ever expressed concern about your use of any of the following drugs:

BaseField.Name: DataField263
BaseField.Text: Have you ever used any drug by injection? (non-medical use only)

BaseField.Name: DataField492
BaseField.Text: In the past 12 months, have you been treated for any of the following? (Mark all that apply)

BaseField.Name: DataField129
BaseField.Text: Answer the following questions about how you have felt over the last 7 days

BaseField.Name: DataField135
BaseField.Text: How would you rate your overall life satisfaction?

BaseField.Name: DataField127
BaseField.Text: How strong are your urges to gamble?

BaseField.Name: DataField133
BaseField.Text: What percentage of your time do you experience urges to gamble?

BaseField.Name: DataField134
BaseField.Text: How much responsibility do you have for the problem gambler's treatment and recovery?

BaseField.Name: DataField142
BaseField.Text: What percentage of your time do you spend dealing with the consequences of problem gambling?

BaseField.Name: DataField148
BaseField.Text: How much has the problem gambler's behavior interfered with your normal activites?

BaseField.Name: DataField131
BaseField.Text: How much has gambling interfered with your normal activities?

BaseField.Name: DataField145
BaseField.Text: Over the last week, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems? Read each item carefully, and select your response:

BaseField.Name: DataField146
BaseField.Text: Little interest or pleasure in doing things

BaseField.Name: DataField155
BaseField.Text: Trouble falling asleep, staying asleep, or sleeping too much

BaseField.Name: DataField158
BaseField.Text: Feeling tired or having little energy

BaseField.Name: DataField163
BaseField.Text: Feeling bad about yourself, feeling that you are a failure, or feeling that you have let yourself or your family down

BaseField.Name: DataField165
BaseField.Text: Trouble concentrating on things such as reading the newspaper or watching television

BaseField.Name: DataField168
BaseField.Text: Moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed. Or being so fidgety or restless that you have been moving around a lot more than usual.

BaseField.Name: DataField170
BaseField.Text: Thinking that you would be better off dead or that you want to hurt yourself in some way

BaseField.Name: Label738
BaseField.Text: Feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge

BaseField.Name: Label740
BaseField.Text: Not being able to stop or control worrying

BaseField.Name: Label743
BaseField.Text: How often do you have trouble wrapping up the final details of a project, once the challenging parts have been done?

BaseField.Name: Label745
BaseField.Text: How often do you have difficulty getting things in order when you have to do a task that requires organization?

BaseField.Name: Label748
BaseField.Text: How often do you have problems remembering appointments or obligations?

BaseField.Name: Label750
BaseField.Text: When you have a task that requires a lot of thought, how often do you avoid or delay getting started?

BaseField.Name: Label753
BaseField.Text: How often do you fidget or squirm with your hands or feet when you have to sit down for a long time?

BaseField.Name: Label755
BaseField.Text: How often do you feel overly active and compelled to do things, like you were driven by a motor?

BaseField.Name: DataField157
BaseField.Text: If you checked off any problem on this questionnaire so far, how difficult have these problems made it for you to get along with other people or participate in the treatment activities?

BaseField.Name: DataField164
BaseField.Text: Please provide us with any open comments and feedback about your treatment:

BaseField.Name: DataField788
BaseField.Text: In which language did you provide today’s treatment services?

BaseField.Name: DataField172
BaseField.Text: Based on your clinical experience, how severe is this client's gambling behavior?

BaseField.Name: DataField173
BaseField.Text: Based on your clinical experience, how adversely affected is this client?

BaseField.Name: DataField174
BaseField.Text: Based on your clinical experience and the client's presentation, how likely is it that this client will complete all of the state-funded treatment sessions?

BaseField.Name: DataField181
BaseField.Text: Compare the client's condition at Intake to this visit, how much has the client changed?

BaseField.Name: DataField192
BaseField.Text: Based on your clinical experience and the client's presentation, how would you rate this client's prognosis for recovery from problem gambing?

ItemList.string: Client will remain an active patient in my practice, self funded
Client will remain an active patient in my practice, additional CalGETS funding requested
Client referred to another CalGETS provider
Client referred to CalGETS IOP or Residential Treatment
Client referred to a non-CalGETS provider
Client lost to follow-up; never returned after last visit

BaseField.Name: Label763
BaseField.Text: Is your client taking any psychiatric medications?

BaseField.Name: Label765
BaseField.Text: If yes, please answer the following three questions:

BaseField.Name: Label768
BaseField.Text: What classes of medication is your client taking? (Check all that apply)

BaseField.Name: Label770
BaseField.Text: Does the prescribing doctor know that the client has a gambling problem?
